description: CompositionBlack V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a pouch and graphic print on the frontWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitDesigned for those who live to party, this tee from jealous 21 says it all. Revel in your ability to make any social gathering come alive and be a real people's person with this black tee. Team it with white shorts or skinny jeans for an outing with friends and look cool all the way. Makes for an apt wear during quick weekend getaways or sleepovers.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
